assertions.reason: SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE_AUDIT.md still contains contradictory pre-M11 XCM/lending claims in active architecture sections, so the required docs do not yet consistently reflect the unified bilateral system.
evidence: SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE_AUDIT.md:68-74 still says "XCM messages are ClearOrigin ONLY" and "demonstrates zero lending-specific cross-chain capability," which contradicts the M11 SetTopic(correlationId) hook path.
SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE_AUDIT.md:349-352 still labels XCM as "STANDALONE (not connected to lending)" and states "NO integration with LendingEngine.liquidate()."

SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE_AUDIT.md:178-220 is otherwise updated with the intended M11 correlationId flow (LendingEngine -> LiquidationHookRegistry -> XcmNotifierAdapter -> XcmLiquidationNotifier -> XcmInbox).

SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE_MERMAID.md:140-155 shows the required bilateral adapter paths, including RiskGateway <-> DeterministicRiskModel, GovernancePolicyStore governance, LendingEngine -> HookRegistry -> XcmNotifierAdapter -> XCM, and XcmInbox receipt correlation.

README.md:371-399 uses canonical M11 contract names and deployment addresses that match dualvm/deployments/polkadot-hub-testnet-m11-canonical.json (e.g. lendingEngine 0x74924a4502f666023510ED21Ae6E27bC47eE6485, riskGateway 0x01E56920355f1936c28A2EA627D027E35EccBca6, governancePolicyStore 0x3471F542f66603a1899947fE5849a612f0A7f465).
docs/dualvm/dualvm_submission_final.md:45-48 and 71-72 remain pre-M11, still describing LendingCore, RiskAdapter, and PvmQuoteProbe with no GovernancePolicyStore/correlationId references.
